extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz won the uphill finish at La Guardia, taking 13 seconds in bonuses to claim red jersey from teammate AFFINI Edoardo.
tactical_patterns: LUTSENKO Alexey in break only 46s down created virtual race lead forcing Jumbo-Visma to chase, dangerous GC breakaway threat.
ROGLIC Primoz beat pure sprinter PEDERSEN Mads on uphill finish, showing returning form after vertebrae fracture concerns from Tour crash.
Jumbo-Visma controlled final climb with KUSS Sepp, then ROGLIC took 13s bonuses to steal jersey from teammate AFFINI.
YATES Simon lost time to main GC group on finish, gap opened suggesting weakness on punchy uphill sprints.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Won uphill sprint over pure sprinter PEDERSEN, answered form questions after vertebrae fracture injuries.
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: Only 46s down pre-stage, got in break forcing GC teams to chase, tactically astute positioning.
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: Lost time to main GC group at finish, gap opened showing vulnerability on punchy uphill arrivals.
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: neutral: Second place on uphill finish, likely takes green jersey but couldn't match ROGLIC's climbing speed.
rider_signals.MAS Enrique: positive: Third place with time bonus, stayed close to ROGLIC on uphill finish showing Movistar competitiveness.
rider_signals.HAYTER Ethan: positive: Best young rider stayed with main GC group on uphill finish, showing stage race legs.
